title: Check Permutation LCCI
titleCn: 判定是否互为字符重排

detail.title: Check Permutation LCCI
detail.content:
Given two strings,write a method to decide if one is a permutation of the other.

Example 1:

Input: s1 = "abc", s2 = "bca"
Output: true

Example 2:

Input: s1 = "abc", s2 = "bad"
Output: false

Note:

  1. 0 <= len(s1) <= 100
  2. 0 <= len(s2) <= 100

codeSnippets.code:
class Solution:
    def CheckPermutation(self, s1: str, s2: str) -> bool:

hints: 描述两个字符串是否互为字符重排的含义。现在，看看你提供的定义，你能否根据这个定义检查字符串
有一种解法需要O(NlogN)的时间。另一种解法需要使用一些空间，但需要运行时间为O(N)
两个重排的字符串应该具有相同的字符，但顺序不同。你可以让它们的顺序一样吗？
